name: scorm-score-injector
description: Web extension to inject SCORM API completion and score values

scripts.build: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
scripts.build:chrome: npm run clean:chrome && npm run copy:chrome
scripts.build:firefox: npm run clean:firefox && npm run copy:firefox
scripts.copy:chrome: mkdir -p dist/chrome && cp manifest.json dist/chrome/ && cp -r popup.html popup.js styles.css content.js icons dist/chrome/
scripts.copy:firefox: mkdir -p dist/firefox && cp manifest-firefox.json dist/firefox/manifest.json && cp -r popup.html popup.js styles.css content.js icons dist/firefox/
scripts.zip: npm run zip:chrome && npm run zip:firefox
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run zip
scripts.dev: npm run build && echo 'Extension built successfully! Load from dist/chrome (Chrome) or dist/firefox (Firefox)'

author: Your Name
